Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,16 +1,61 @@
 import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
-import 'package:task_manager_flutter/data/customization/generic_grid_card_1_0.dart';
-import 'package:task_manager_flutter/data/models/chamado_model.dart';
+import 'package:task_manager_flutter/data/customization/generic_grid_card_1_1.dart';
 import 'package:task_manager_flutter/data/services/auth_service.dart';
 
 class ChamadosScreenDinamic extends StatelessWidget {
   const ChamadosScreenDinamic({super.key});
 
   @override
   Widget build(BuildContext context) {
-    return DynamicGridDynamicScreen<Chamado>(
-      telaNome: 'chamados', // ← APENAS ISSO!
-      hasPermission: (permission) => AuthService().hasPermission(permission),
+    return GenericMobileGridScreen(
+      title: 'Chamados',
+      fetchEndpoint: '/api/chamados',
+      createEndpoint: '/api/chamados',
+      updateEndpoint: '/api/chamados/:id',
+      deleteEndpoint: '/api/chamados/:id',
+      hasPermission: (p) => AuthService().hasPermission(p),
+      baseUrlForMultipart: 'https://seu-dominio.com', // se precisar
+      authHeadersProvider: () async =>
+          await AuthService().authHeaders(), // se precisar de auth
+      fieldConfigs: [
+        FieldConfig(
+            label: 'ID', fieldName: 'id', isInForm: false, isFixed: true),
+        FieldConfig(label: 'Título', fieldName: 'titulo', isRequired: true),
+        FieldConfig(
+            label: 'Descrição',
+            fieldName: 'descricao',
+            fieldType: FieldType.multiline),
+        FieldConfig(
+          label: 'Status',
+          fieldName: 'status',
+          fieldType: FieldType.dropdown,
+          dropdownOptions: [
+            {'label': 'Aberto', 'value': 'ABERTO'},
+            {'label': 'Em Andamento', 'value': 'ANDAMENTO'},
+            {'label': 'Fechado', 'value': 'FECHADO'},
+          ],
+        ),
+        FieldConfig(
+            label: 'Responsável',
+            fieldName: 'responsavel.nome',
+            isInForm: false),
+        FieldConfig(
+            label: 'Data',
+            fieldName: 'dataCriacao',
+            fieldType: FieldType.date,
+            isInForm: false),
+        FieldConfig(
+          label: 'Anexo',
+          fieldName: 'arquivo',
+          fieldType: FieldType.file,
+          fileConfig: FileConfig(
+            fileFieldName: 'arquivo', // nome do campo no multipart
+            allowMultiple: false,
+            allowedExtensions: ['pdf', 'png', 'jpg', 'jpeg'],
+          ),
+        ),
+      ],
+      enableDebugMode: true,
     );
   }
 }
